paper_key: spontaneously generated electrons for cosub2sub hydrogenation to formate at the microinterface of airwater
title: Spontaneously Generated Electrons for CO2 Hydrogenation to Formate at the Microinterface of Air‐Water
reactants: CO2, OH- (from water microdroplets), Cu ions (as additive)
experimental_conditions: Ambient conditions, no additives (except Cu ions in some experiments)
proposed_mechanism: OH- spontaneously donates electrons for CO2 hydrogenation, driven by strong electric field at microdroplet interfaces; Cu ions undergo valence alternation to deposit electrons and promote formate conversion.
key_information_summary: This work demonstrates that in water microdroplets, OH- can spontaneously donate electrons for CO2 hydrogenation to formic acid, driven by strong electric fields at interfaces. Cu ions increase formate output by 4000 times. The study implies microdroplets could have enabled nonenzymatic CO2 reduction in prebiotic chemistry.

paper_key: spontaneous reduction of transition metal ions by one electron in water microdroplets and the atmospheric implications
title: Spontaneous Reduction of Transition Metal Ions by One Electron in Water Microdroplets and the Atmospheric Implications
experimental_conditions: ['ambient atmosphere', 'glove box with controlled gas composition (O2, CO2, NO2)']
proposed_mechanism: spontaneously generated electrons in water microdroplets drive reduction; O2, CO2, and NO2 compete for these electrons forming O2-, HCO2-, and NO2- respectively
key_information_summary: This study demonstrates that water microdroplets enable spontaneous one-electron reduction of ligated Fe(III) and Cu(II) to Fe(II) and Cu(I) via interfacially generated electrons — a process absent in bulk water. Competing gases (O2, CO2, NO2) intercept these electrons, revealing a new atmospheric redox pathway with implications for aerosol and cloud chemistry.

paper_key: catalystfree transformation of carbon dioxide to small organic compounds in water microdroplets nebulized by different gases
title: Catalyst‐Free Transformation of Carbon Dioxide to Small Organic Compounds in Water Microdroplets Nebulized by Different Gases
reaction_or_process: 二氧化碳的加氢/还原反应 (Hydrogenation/reduction of CO2)
products: 甲酸根 (formate, HCOO-), 乙酸根 (acetate, CH3COO-), 乙二醇 (ethylene glycol, HOCH2CH2OH), 甲烷 (methane, CH4)
droplet_generation_method: 气动雾化 (Nebulized spray, 使用CO2, N2, O2或压缩空气作为鞘气)
experimental_conditions: 液体流速 100 μL/min，鞘气压力 100 psi，喷雾距离 10 mm，收集时间 15 min，在密闭不锈钢腔室中进行，喷雾前循环抽真空和充气三次。
proposed_mechanism: 碳酸氢根优先吸附在液滴表面形成双电层，强电场驱动电子从碳酸氢根转移到溶解的CO2，生成CO2自由基阴离子 (·CO2-) 或羟基自由基 (·OH)，随后通过一系列自由基链式反应生成甲酸、乙二醇、乙酸和甲烷。此外，气相CO2也可在气液界面与·OH反应。
key_information_summary: 本文利用简单的气动雾化装置，研究了水微液滴中CO2的无催化剂转化。通过NMR和质谱证实了甲酸、乙酸、乙二醇和甲烷的生成。研究提出微液滴表面的双电层和界面自由基反应是驱动这一热力学上在体相难以发生的还原反应的关键机制。
source_name: Advanced Science - 2024 - Mehrgardi - Catalyst‐Free Transformation of Carbon Dioxide to Small Organic Compounds in Water.pdf

paper_key: spontaneous αch carboxylation of ketones by gaseous cosub2sub at the airwater interface of aqueous microdroplets
title: Spontaneous α‐C?H Carboxylation of Ketones by Gaseous CO2 at the Air‐water Interface of Aqueous Microdroplets
reaction_or_process: 酮的α-C-H羧基化反应 / 二氧化碳的还原与碳-碳键的形成 (reduction of carbon dioxide integrated with the formation of a carbon-carbon bond)
reactants: 气态二氧化碳 (Gaseous CO2), 酮类 (Ketones, 共7种不同酮)
products: β-酮酸 (β-ketoacid) / 羧基化有机产物
microdroplet_type: 带负电荷的水微液滴 (negatively charged aqueous microdroplets)
experimental_conditions: 环境温度 (ambient temperature), 无催化剂 (catalyst-free), 反应动力学受试剂浓度、CO2气压和液滴飞行距离控制
proposed_mechanism: 通过酮的α-碳生成碳负离子，随后对CO2发生亲核加成 (carbanion generation at the α-carbon of a ketone followed by nucleophilic addition to CO2)
key_information_summary: 该论文报道了一种在带负电荷的水微液滴气液界面处发生的无催化剂、室温下酮类自发α-C-H羧基化反应。利用在线质谱和理论计算，研究证实了反应通过碳负离子中间体和亲核加成生成β-酮酸，并揭示了微液滴中的水环境对该过程的促进作用。此方法为CO2还原与碳碳键形成提供了绿色新策略。

paper_key: spontaneous reduction by one electron on water microdroplets facilitates direct carboxylation with cosub2sub
title: Spontaneous Reduction by One Electron on Water Microdroplets Facilitates Direct Carboxylation with CO2
reaction_or_process: C6F5I的还原及与CO2的羧化反应
proposed_mechanism: 水微滴自发产生电子，将C6F5I还原为自由基阴离子C6F5I•-，电子位于C-I键σ*反键轨道，削弱C-I键生成C6F5-，后者进攻CO2的碳原子生成C6F5CO2-
key_information_summary: 本研究设计了一种无催化剂策略，利用水微滴的强还原性将C6F5I还原为C6F5-，进而与CO2反应生成五氟苯甲酸根。通过阴离子光电子能谱证实了自由基阴离子的存在和电子分布。该工作展示了微滴化学在CO2利用中的绿色新途径。

paper_key: simultaneous and spontaneous oxidation and reduction in microdroplets by the water radical cationanion pair
title: Simultaneous and Spontaneous Oxidation and Reduction in Microdroplets by the Water Radical Cation/Anion Pair
reaction_or_process: 膦酸酯（phosphonates）同时自发氧化为五价磷酸（pentavalent phosphoric acids）和还原为膦酸（phosphonic acids）；二氧化碳（CO2）还原为甲酸（formate）
reactants: 膦酸酯（如甲基膦酸二甲酯 DMMP 等多种衍生物）、水（H2O）、二氧化碳（CO2）
products: 膦酸（phosphonic acids，还原产物）、五价磷酸（phosphoric acids，氧化产物）、甲酸（formate，CO2还原产物）、水自由基阳离子加合物（water radical cation adducts）
microdroplet_type: 水微液滴（water microdroplets）、含微量水的乙腈微液滴（acetonitrile microdroplets containing traces of water）
droplet_generation_method: 纳升电喷雾电离（nanoelectrospray ionization, nESI）、感应纳升电喷雾电离（inductive nESI）
solvent_or_medium: 纯水（pure water）、重水（D2O）、含15% H2O2的水溶液、乙腈（含微量水）
experimental_conditions: 常温常压（ambient conditions），喷雾距离（spray distance，5 mm至35 mm），正负离子检测模式，不同反应物浓度，氮气除气或富CO2环境
proposed_mechanism: 水分子在微液滴表面强电场作用下解离为水自由基阳离子/阴离子对（water radical cation/anion pair）。由于极性相反，这些自由离子在液滴表面分离并积累形成双层结构（double-layer structure）。外层富集水自由基阳离子，提供强氧化能力将膦酸酯氧化；内层积累水自由基阴离子（水合电子），提供强还原能力将膦酸酯还原并还原CO2。
key_information_summary: 本文研究了微液滴中膦酸酯的自发氧化还原反应。通过nESI-MS分析，发现水微液滴和含微量水的乙腈微液滴中能同时发生膦酸酯的氧化（生成五价磷酸）和还原（生成膦酸），以及CO2还原为甲酸。研究表明，微液滴表面的强电场促使水分子解离为水自由基阳离子和阴离子，并形成双层结构，外层富集氧化性阳离子，内层富集还原性阴离子，从而实现了同时的氧化还原反应。
source_name: 2022_Lingqi Qiu_Simultaneous and Spontaneous Oxidation and Reduction in Microdroplets by the Water Radical Cation_Anion Pair.pdf

paper_key: significant acceleration of photocatalytic co2 reduction at the gasliquid interface of microdroplets
title: Significant Acceleration of Photocatalytic CO2 Reduction at the Gas‐Liquid Interface of Microdroplets
reaction_or_process: 光催化CO2还原反应 (Photocatalytic CO2 reduction reaction, CO2RR)
reactants: CO2, H2O, 光催化剂 (WO3·0.33H2O, Au/TiO2, Au/ZnO)
microdroplet_type: 含有光催化剂的水相微液滴
droplet_generation_method: 微液滴打印机 (在超疏水石英基底上打印阵列)；电喷雾器 (用于规模化生产演示)
experimental_conditions: 365 nm UV光照射，无牺牲剂，室温，高纯加湿CO2气氛
proposed_mechanism: 1. 高比表面积(S/V)促进CO2向催化剂表面的高效传质；2. 微液滴气液界面存在固有的强电场，该电场有效促进了光生电子-空穴对的分离，抑制了电荷复合，是反应加速的本质原因。
key_information_summary: 本文研究了微液滴气液界面对光催化CO2还原反应的显著加速作用。利用微液滴打印机生成含催化剂的水相微液滴，在无牺牲剂和紫外光条件下，HCOOH和CH3OH的产率比体相水溶液高出两个数量级。研究结合实验表征与分子动力学模拟，证实除了高比表面积带来的高效CO2传质外，微液滴气液界面的强内建电场有效促进了光生电子-空穴对的分离，是反应加速的根本原因。此外，研究还展示了利用电喷雾器进行规模化生产的潜力。
source_name: 2023_Qiuyue Ge_Significant Acceleration of Photocatalytic CO_sub_2_sub_ Reduction at the Gas‐Liquid Interface of Microdroplets_.pdf

paper_key: spraying water microdroplets containing 123triazole converts carbon dioxide into formic acid
title: Spraying Water Microdroplets Containing 1,2,3-Triazole Converts Carbon Dioxide into Formic Acid
reaction_or_process: 二氧化碳还原反应 (CO2 reduction to formic acid)
reactants: 二氧化碳 (CO2), 1,2,3-三唑 (1,2,3-triazole, Tz), 水 (H2O)
droplet_generation_method: 同轴声波喷雾 (coaxial sonic spraying)
experimental_conditions: 室温，无外加电压，使用N2或CO2作为雾化气，液滴飞行距离24 mm，速度80 m/s
proposed_mechanism: 推测Tz在气液界面(GLI)提供质子和氢氧根(OH-)，通过逐步电子转移将气相CO2还原为甲酸。Tz的2H是质子给体，自由电子可能来源于OH-、Tz阴离子甚至氢化物(H-)。
key_information_summary: 本文报道了一种利用同轴声波喷雾产生含1,2,3-三唑(Tz)的水微液滴，在室温下将气相CO2高效还原为甲酸的方法。该反应在气液界面发生，无需外加电压，转化率超80%，反应时间仅300微秒，揭示了微液滴界面特殊的氧化还原特性在碳捕获和转化中的潜力。
source_name: 2022_Xiaowei Song_Spraying Water Microdroplets Containing 1,2,3-Triazole Converts Carbon Dioxide into Formic Acid.pdf

paper_key: the role of interfaces and charge for chemical reactivity in microdroplets
title: The Role of Interfaces and Charge for Chemical Reactivity in Microdroplets
reaction_or_process: Various reactions (e.g., hydrogen peroxide formation, reduction of transition metal complexes)
proposed_mechanism: Partial solvation, possible gas phase channels, presence of highly reactive intermediates, role of droplet charge and associated electric fields
key_information_summary: This perspective reviews how interfaces and charge influence chemical reactivity in microdroplets, highlighting acceleration of reactions, proposed mechanisms, and the importance of electric fields.

paper_key: charged water microdroplets enable dissociation of surrounding dioxygen
title: Charged Water Microdroplets Enable Dissociation of Surrounding Dioxygen
reaction_or_process: 氧气（O2）的激活与解离（O-O键断裂），以及后续转化为臭氧阴离子及其他活性氧物种的过程
reactants: O2 (氧气), H2O (水), CO2 (二氧化碳)
products: O3-, H2O·O3-, ·OH, CO3-, HCO4-, O2-, H2O2 等活性氧物种 (ROS)
microdroplet_type: 带电水微液滴 (Charged water microdroplets)
droplet_generation_method: 同轴毛细管喷雾 (Coaxial capillary spray)，结合高压鞘气和高压电 (-4 kV)
experimental_conditions: 喷雾电压 -4 kV，鞘气为 O2、压缩空气或 N2，质谱入口毛细管温度 30 °C，微液滴平均直径约 10 μm
proposed_mechanism: 带电液滴气液界面的高电场以及带相反电荷的水微液滴之间的微闪电（microlightning）诱导放电，导致 O-O 键断裂，生成多种 ROS。生成的 O- 或 O3- 进一步与水或空气中的 CO2 反应生成 ·OH、CO3- 和 HCO4- 等。
key_information_summary: 本文利用在线质谱技术，首次直接检测到带电水微液滴喷雾中气液界面处氧气自发解离生成的多种活性氧物种（ROS）。研究表明，界面高电场和微闪电诱导的放电促使 O-O 键断裂。通过同位素标记和捕获实验，详细阐明了 O2 转化为 O3-、·OH、CO3- 等物种的机制，为微液滴化学中 ROS 的生成提供了全新视角和无催化剂的绿色途径。
source_name: 2025_Jian Zhou_Charged Water Microdroplets Enable Dissociation of Surrounding Dioxygen.pdf

paper_key: spontaneous generation of supsupchsub2subcn from acetonitrile at the airwater interface
title: Spontaneous Generation of <sup>?</sup>CH<sub>2</sub>CN from Acetonitrile at the Air–Water Interface
key_information_summary: This study reports the first observation of spontaneous deprotonation of acetonitrile (CH3CN) to form the carbanion ⁻CH2CN at the air-water interface of microdroplets—contrary to its known stability in bulk aqueous solution. The process proceeds via an indirect, redox-mediated mechanism involving hydroxyl radicals and electrons, enabled by interfacial effects. The resulting ⁻CH2CN is highly reactive and participates in nucleophilic additions—including CO2 fixation—highlighting unique reactivity in microdroplets with implications for atmospheric chemistry.

paper_key: dissolved oxygen redox as the source of hydrogen peroxide and hydroxyl radical in sonicated emulsive water microdroplets
title: Dissolved Oxygen Redox as the Source of Hydrogen Peroxide and Hydroxyl Radical in Sonicated Emulsive Water Microdroplets
reaction_or_process: Dissolved O2 redox leading to H2O2 and OH radical formation
experimental_conditions: Continuous O2 bubbling, sonication for 1 h
proposed_mechanism: Dissolved O2 reduction pathway enabled by sufficiently large reducing power, generating H2O2 and OH radical; also produces H2 and enables Pb electroless deposition
key_information_summary: This study identifies dissolved O2 as the origin of reactive oxygen species in sonicated emulsive water microdroplets, elucidates the redox mechanism, and shows high H2O2 yield with O2 bubbling, positioning SEWMs as redox microreactors.
